use_cases: Visualizing multi-step onboarding or wizard processes in SaaS applications
Displaying growth metrics or progression data in dashboards
Showing process pipelines or workflow stages in project management tools
Illustrating educational course progression or learning paths
Creating visual hierarchies in landing page sections to guide user attention
ai_summary: An animated process visualization component displaying 5 ascending bar pillars with gradient styling and scroll-triggered animations. Each pillar represents a step in a process, growing from bottom to top on viewport entry with staggered delays. The component features a clean minimalist design with blue gradient fills, subtle borders, and responsive layout. Ideal for SaaS landing pages, onboarding flows, or dashboard visualizations showing process completion or growth metrics.
